mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.pid, p.name, p.value, p.icon, p.type FROM ums_admin_role_relation arr JOIN ums_role r ON arr.role_id = r.id AND r.status = 1 JOIN ums_role_permission_relation rpr ON r.id = rpr.role_id JOIN ums_permission p ON rpr.permission_id = p.id WHERE arr.admin_id = #{adminId}
